item.description:
Zinogre ⚡

  1. Faster preview: Two-phase rendering shows text instantly while local images load lazily in the background, cutting perceived latency significantly
  2. Open in Terminal: New Cmd+J shortcut opens the current folder in Terminal from anywhere in the app, with a folder context menu entry as well
  3. Copy Path: Right-click any note to copy its full file path to the clipboard
  4. Spanish localization: Full Spanish (es) UI translation covering all menus, settings, and system strings
  5. Mermaid upgraded to v11.14.0, fixing subgraph edge rendering and adding new diagram features
  6. Live reload fixed: Notes modified by external tools now reload correctly, including files inside symlinked directories (closes #502)
  7. Launch and window fixes: Opening .md files directly from Finder no longer shows a blank window, and single-pane mode correctly restores notes on launch and quit
  8. Export and mode transitions: Fixed blank preview on note switch, PPT/Presentation mode exit timing, and export timeout handling
  9. Concurrency safety: Resolved ExportCache data race, scoped URL leaks, and stale-note assignment after async rendering

Zinogre ⚡

  1. 预览更快：两阶段渲染让文字立即显示，本地图片在后台懒加载，明显减少预览首屏等待时间
  2. 终端快捷入口：新增 Cmd+J 全局快捷键，随时打开当前文件夹所在终端，文件夹右键菜单也有对应入口
  3. 复制路径：右键任意笔记可直接复制完整文件路径
  4. 西班牙语本地化：完整覆盖菜单、设置页和系统字符串的西班牙语翻译
  5. Mermaid 升级至 v11.14.0，修复子图连线渲染问题并新增图表功能
  6. 实时重载修复：其他工具修改的笔记现在能正确触发重载，含符号链接目录内的文件（closes #502）
  7. 启动与窗口修复：从 Finder 直接打开 .md 文件不再出现白屏，单栏模式下启动和退出时也不会再丢失笔记
  8. 导出与模式切换：修复切换笔记时预览空白、PPT 演示模式退出时序混乱、导出超时处理异常等问题
  9. 并发安全：修复 ExportCache 数据竞争、安全作用域 URL 泄漏、异步渲染后笔记状态错乱等问题

Astalos ⚙️

  1. CLI 更顺手：扩展了 miao 命令，补全搜索、列出、打开和查看笔记等能力，并改进了路径解析与默认列表行为。
  2. 外部修改可重载：新增重新加载当前笔记的快捷入口，文件被其他工具改动后可以更快同步回应用。
  3. 侧边栏更稳定：修复窗口启动和宽度变化时侧边栏项目内容溢出的问题，并恢复 Cmd+1 侧边栏快捷键。
  4. 预览与访问修复：修复预览样式空闲后丢失的问题，并恢复单栏模式下的文件夹访问能力。

Astalos ⚙️

  1. Better CLI: Expanded the miao command with search, list, open, and note viewing support, while improving path resolution and default list behavior.
  2. Reload external edits: Added a quick way to reload the current note so changes made by other tools can be pulled back into the app faster.
  3. Steadier sidebar: Fixed sidebar item overflow during launch and width changes, and restored the Cmd+1 shortcut for the sidebar.
  4. Preview and access fixes: Fixed preview styles disappearing after idle and restored folder access in single-pane mode.

Zinogre 🍝

  1. Apple 公证：花了 688 元、给库克写信投诉才办下来，终于不会出现 App 损坏提示以及不用再去系统设置里点"仍然打开"了！
  2. 预览稳定性：修复预览偶发空白问题，增强 WebContent 进程异常后的恢复能力。
  3. 编辑体验：修复分栏模式下输入法问题，解决系统快捷键冲突，消除切换笔记时高亮闪烁。
  4. App Store 能力：新增沙盒权限配置，强化存储路径持久化流程。
  5. 多语言打磨：将硬编码文案迁移到国际化资源，完善首启模板内容。

Zinogre 🍝

  1. Notarization: After investing ¥688 and writing to Tim Cook, finally done — no more "app is damaged" or "Open Anyway" hassles!
  2. Preview stability: Fixed intermittent blank preview and enhanced WebContent crash recovery.
  3. Editing refinements: Fixed IME issues in split mode, resolved system shortcut conflicts, and eliminated highlight flashing when switching notes.
  4. App Store readiness: Added sandbox entitlements and improved Security Scoped Bookmark persistence.
  5. Internationalization: Replaced hardcoded strings with i18n resources and improved first-launch templates.

本次更新因签名密钥更换，需手动下载安装。下载最新 DMG 后，首次打开：双击 MiaoYan.app → 系统设置 → 隐私与安全性 → 点击「仍要打开」

This update requires manual download due to signing key change. After downloading the latest DMG, first launch: Double-click MiaoYan.app → System Settings → Privacy & Security → Click "Open Anyway"

更精致 🪿

  1. 查找替换：预览区新增原生开发的查找替换栏，支持"替换"与"全部替换"，交互体验统一。
  2. 滚动同步：重写分屏同步算法，采用动态阈值机制，彻底解决滚动抖动与错位问题。
  3. 性能优化：文档格式化改为后台异步执行，拒绝界面卡顿；新增大文件智能降级高亮策略。
  4. 存储权限：引入 Security Scoped Bookmark 机制，彻底修复重启后外部目录权限丢失问题。
  5. 新手引导：首次启动自动生成多语言分类模版（指南/示例/笔记），目录结构更清晰。

More exquisite 🪿

  1. Preview Find & Replace: Implemented a brand new native Search bar for Preview, adding support for Replace and Replace All.
  2. Split-View Sync: Rewrote the scrolling synchronization algorithm with dynamic thresholds for perfect alignment and stability.
  3. Performance: Formatting is now asynchronous to avoid UI freezing; added smart highlighting downgrade for large files.
  4. Storage Stability: Adopted Security Scoped Bookmarks to permanently fix external folder permission issues on restart.
  5. Onboarding: Redesigned first-launch experience with localized folder templates (Guide/Examples/Notes).

更稳 🚵🏿‍♂️

  1. 视觉精致升级：图标统一尺寸与灰度状态，激活色更清晰，明暗模式更一致
  2. 预览切换体验优化：柔和显隐，保留选区/滚动，分栏与窗口缩放更稳定
  3. 导出体验全面升级：进度提示、标题注入、PDF/图片/PPT 输出改进，深色导出与预览一致
  4. 侧边栏支持子文件夹与展开状态维护，也即支持文件夹嵌套了
  5. 性能增强：笔记内容懒加载、预览更新防抖、输入/渲染更流畅
  6. 搜索能力增强，并在保存失败时提供更清晰的提示
  7. 可靠性与隐私：防止重载丢稿、单模式路径修复、移除遥测
  8. 单模式修复：正确定位项目与笔记，启动后编辑区保持可见
  9. 侧边栏宽度与分栏体验优化，修复旧版初始化宽度问题
  10. 内容安全增强：快速切换分屏时避免旧内容回滚
  11. 预览与样式细节优化：对齐规则、图片链接去下划线、TOC 提示更柔和
  12. 文档与发布流程升级：安装说明更新，新增构建脚本与导出配置

Steady 🚵🏿‍♂️

  1. Visual refinement: unified icon sizing/tints, clearer active states, better dark/light adaptability
  2. Smoother preview toggle with soft reveal, plus editor selection/scroll preservation and steadier split-view resizing
  3. Export overhaul: progress feedback, improved PDF/image/PPT output, dark-mode export matches preview
  4. Sidebar subfolders with proper expansion state handling
  5. Performance boosts: lazy-loaded note content, debounced preview updates, faster input/preview rendering
  6. Search improvements and better error feedback when note saving fails
  7. Reliability & privacy: save-before-reload to prevent data loss, symlink fix for single mode, telemetry removed
  8. Single mode fixes: correct project selection, stable note focus, editor stays visible on launch
  9. Sidebar resizing: width syncing, legacy layout repair, smoother split-view behavior
  10. Content safety: prevent stale reloads during rapid split toggles
  11. Preview/TOC/typography tweaks: alignment rules, image link underline removal, lighter TOC hover
  12. Docs & release tooling: updated install guidance, new build script and export options
